_description: Configure mark type and color/text/detail encoding on a worksheet. Encodings go in pane > encodings (NOT inside pane > view > mark — that gets stripped by loadMetadataFromXml).

color_encoding._placement: Inside worksheet > table > panes > pane > encodings (NOT inside mark node)
color_encoding._warning: WRONG placement: pane > view > mark > encoding — this gets stripped by loadMetadataFromXml

full_pane_example._description: Complete pane structure showing correct encoding placement

notes.setting_mark_type: Change the 'class' attribute on the mark node inside panes > pane
notes.CRITICAL: Encodings MUST be direct children of pane (inside an 'encodings' wrapper), NOT inside the mark node. Mark-level encodings are stripped by loadMetadataFromXml.
